mapper.select: select * from auction where id = #{id} and deleted = false
select * from auction where deleted = false
select * from auction where deleted = false and status = #{status}

insert into auction ( title, description, start_price, start_at, end_at, status, created_at, modified_at, deleted ) values ( #{title}, #{description}, #{startPrice}, #{startAt}, #{endAt}, #{status}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, false ) RETURNING id, title, description, start_price, start_at, end_at, status, winner_id, created_at, modified_at, deleted
mapper.update: update auction set status = #{status}, start_at = case when #{status} = 'ACTIVE' and status is distinct from 'ACTIVE' then CURRENT_TIMESTAMP else start_at end, end_at = case when #{status} in ('COMPLETED', 'NO_BIDDER') and status = 'ACTIVE' then CURRENT_TIMESTAMP else end_at end, modified_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP where id = #{id} and deleted = false
update auction set winner_id = #{winnerId}, modified_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP where id = #{id} and deleted = false

update auction as ac set status = case when exists ( select 1 from bid b where b.auction_id = ac.id ) then 'COMPLETED' else 'NO_BIDDER' end, winner_id = case when exists ( select 1 from bid b where b.auction_id = ac.id ) then ( select b.bidder_id from bid b where b.auction_id = ac.id order by b.amount desc, b.placed_at desc limit 1 ) else null end, modified_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP where ac.status = 'ACTIVE' and ac.end_at <= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP and ac.deleted = false
update auction as ac set status = 'ACTIVE', modified_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP where start_at <= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP and end_at > CURRENT_TIMESTAMP and status = 'DRAFT' and deleted = false
